name: Poached Salmon with Hollandaise Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Get four salmon steaks about 1 inch thick.
2. Do not use margarine in this sauce!
3. Prepare the Hollandaise Sauce: Heat water, salt, peppercorns, lemon slices, parsley, onion, and bay leaf to boiling in a 12-inch skillet. Reduce heat; simmer covered for 5 minutes. Add salmon steaks, adding water if necessary to cover them. Bring to boiling, then reduce heat. Simmer uncovered until fish flakes easily with fork (12-15 minutes).
4. For Hollandaise Sauce: In a saucepan, vigorously stir egg yolks and lemon juice. Gradually add melted butter, stirring constantly over low heat until fully incorporated. Add remaining butter; continue stirring until thickened.
5. Serve hot or at room temperature; refrigerate any leftovers. To reheat, stir in small amount of hot water before serving.
